failures.name: Heating system not working
failures.summary: The agent failed to assess urgency adequately and did not capture all necessary information before attempting to transfer.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not assess urgency effectively by not confirming the emergency nature of the situation before transferring.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, my furnace won't turn on. It's really cold in here.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Are you noticing any burning smell, gas smell, smoke, or water leaking?
No, nothing like that. Just won’t turn on at all.
I want to make sure we get someone out to you as fast as possible — can I transfer you to our emergency line right now?
I'm going to transfer you to our emergency line right now. One moment, please.
I'm just going to transfer you now, one moment please.

The transfer was not able to connect. I'm really sorry about that — I wasn't able to connect you right now. 

Can I get your full name and callback number?
My name is Tom Brown, and my number is 555-444-3333.

Great, thanks for that. Just to confirm, I have Tom Brown at 555-444-3333. 

Can you provide your service address?
Yes, it's 654 Maple Ave, Dallas, TX.

Perfect, got it. So, that's 654 Maple Ave, Dallas, TX. 

What issue are you experiencing?
My furnace won’t turn on at all. It's cold in the house.
Just to confirm, I have Tom Brown, callback number 555-444-3333, service address 654 Maple Ave, Dallas, TX, and you need assistance with your furnace not turning on. Does all of that sound right?
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

all_results.name: Basic service request
all_results.summary: All required data points were captured and confirmed, and the call was closed with the scripted phrase.

all_results.name: Emergency - no heat in winter
all_results.summary: The agent identified the situation as an emergency, offered a live transfer, and handled the urgency appropriately.

all_results.name: Quote request
all_results.summary: The agent successfully routed to the install/quote path, captured the necessary information, did not provide a price, and scheduled a callback.

all_results.name: Existing customer follow-up
all_results.summary: The agent successfully routed the call to the existing customer path and offered to transfer the caller.

all_results.name: FAQ - hours inquiry
all_results.summary: The agent answered the FAQ about hours without collecting unnecessary lead information.

all_results.name: Request live person immediately
all_results.summary: The agent offered to transfer the caller and handled the transfer failure gracefully with a callback.

all_results.name: AC making strange noise
all_results.summary: All required information was captured and confirmed without diagnosing the noise or treating it as an emergency.

all_results.name: Heating system not working
all_results.summary: The agent failed to assess urgency adequately and did not capture all necessary information before attempting to transfer.
all_results.root_cause: The agent did not assess urgency effectively by not confirming the emergency nature of the situation before transferring.

all_results.name: Spam robocall
all_results.summary: The call was routed to the spam path and ended politely.

all_results.name: Wrong number
all_results.summary: The agent clarified they are an HVAC company, helped redirect the caller, and did not attempt to capture a lead.

all_results.name: Maintenance request
all_results.summary: The agent successfully captured the caller's name, phone number, address, and service type, read back the full summary, and closed with the scripted phrase.

all_results.name: No cooling with burning smell
all_results.summary: The agent recognized the potential emergency, verified the urgency, and offered a transfer option.

all_results.name: Callback requested
all_results.summary: The agent captured minimal information, confirmed the callback, and did not pressure for more details.

all_results.name: Ductwork cleaning inquiry
all_results.summary: The agent answered the inquiry and captured lead information for follow-up.

all_results.name: End of call - caller decides to wait
all_results.summary: The agent handled the call gracefully and closed professionally without pressure.
